tailored_cv.summary: Senior Data Engineer with 8+ years building large-scale batch and streaming pipelines on AWS and GCP. Led the migration of a 200 TB data warehouse to Snowflake, reducing query latency by 60%. Experienced with Apache Kafka, dbt, Spark, and Airflow; strong focus on data quality, observability, and platform reliability.
tailored_cv.core_competencies:
- Streaming & Batch Pipeline Design
- Data Warehouse Modelling (Snowflake, BigQuery)
- Apache Kafka & Event-Driven Architectures
- dbt Data Transformation
- AWS / GCP Cloud Infrastructure
- Observability & Data Quality Frameworks
- Cross-functional Stakeholder Collaboration
- Agile / Scrum Engineering Practices
tailored_cv.skills:
## Languages
Python, SQL, Scala
## Data Platforms
Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift
## Streaming
Apache Kafka, AWS Kinesis
## Orchestration
Apache Airflow, Prefect
## Transformation
dbt, Spark
## Cloud
AWS (S3, Glue, Lambda), GCP (Dataflow, Pub/Sub)
## Observability
Datadog, Great Expectations, Monte Carlo
tailored_cv.experience:
## Acme Corp
**Senior Data Engineer**
Jan 2021 – Present | Remote

- Designed and operated Kafka-based event streaming pipelines ingesting 50 M events/day with sub-second latency.
- Migrated 200 TB data warehouse from Redshift to Snowflake; improved average query time by 60%.
- Built dbt modelling layer covering 300+ models with automated testing via Great Expectations.
- Reduced pipeline incident rate by 40% through Datadog SLO dashboards and alerting.

parsed_jd.title: Senior Data Engineer
must_haves: Experience with streaming systems (Kafka or Kinesis)
Cloud data warehouse experience (Snowflake or BigQuery)

gap_analysis.suggestion: Add 'ETL' to the skills section alongside existing pipeline terms.
Add 'ELT' near the dbt and Snowflake mentions to reflect modern reverse-ETL patterns.
